summary: Well-organized test suite with good coverage of core functionality and clear TDD methodology. Unit tests thoroughly exercise the happy path with proper mocking, and integration tests verify workflow structure and end-to-end execution via act. However, the suite lacks edge case tests (malformed versions, case sensitivity, empty lists), doesn't test failure scenarios (denied dependencies exit code 1), doesn't verify other manifest formats mentioned in the task (requirements.txt), and the large beforeAll hook in integration tests could mask setup issues. Invalid JSON in manifest is handled in code but not tested in unit tests. Exact string assertions in act tests are good for catching format regressions but somewhat brittle. Missing CLI argument parsing edge cases.
